acme.Description: All of Acme's documentation, runbooks, and tribal knowledge — searchable in seconds.

Features.Title: Instant Answers
Features.Description: Ask anything about Acme processes. Get answers sourced from Confluence, Notion, and Slack.

Features.Title: Compliance Ready
Features.Description: SOC 2 + HIPAA compliant infrastructure. Your data stays within your boundary.

Features.Title: Fast Indexing
Features.Description: Index your entire knowledge base in minutes, not hours.

Features.Title: Team Silos
Features.Description: Engineering, Sales, and Support each get their own isolated knowledge base.

Features.Title: Knowledge Gaps
Features.Description: See what your team searches for but can't find. Fill gaps proactively.

Features.Title: API Access
Features.Description: RESTful API with SSO integration and webhook support.
